title: Paw Patrol, Zuma’s Hovercraft, Toy Vehicle with Collectible Action Figure, Sustainably Minded Kids’ Toys for Boys & Girls Aged 3 and Up
features: COLLECTIBLE ZUMA FIGURE: This toy hovercraft vehicle includes a collectible Zuma toy figure. Wearing his signature aquatic uniform, Zuma is ready to save the day
PAW PATROL HOVERCRAFT: Clip Zuma into the driver’s seat of his hovercraft, which features authentic detailing, plus working wheels and fans that spin, before racing off on a thrilling mission
SUSTAINABLY MINDED TOY: Zuma and his PAW Patrol toy hovercraft are made from at least 68% pre-consumer recycled plastic. Kids can explore their imagination, creating missions with their favourite pup
COLLECT THEM ALL: For more fun, collect all of the PAW Patrol toys, like the Air Rescue kids’ toys, PAW Patrol film toys, dragon toys, stuffed animals, toy figures and playsets (each sold separately)
LEARNING AND EDUCATION TOYS: PAW plush toys and toy cars are toys for girls and boys who enjoy building toys and gifts for kids 3 and up, as an alternative to dolls, dinosaur toys or a train set
